title: ADHD Brain Magic
subtitle: Embrace Your Magical Mind
description: Celebrate the extraordinary creative magic that comes with ADHD! This vibrant design features colorful sparkles, magical swirls, and a glowing brain at the center - because your mind is nothing short of magical. Perfect for neurodivergent folks who know their brain works differently (and that's AMAZING!). The bold, energetic colors reflect the beautiful chaos of an ADHD brain turning ideas into reality. Wear this with pride and let the world know your magic is real!
mockupPrompt: Product mockup on a white ceramic coffee mug, professional studio lighting, the mug features a vibrant design with colorful sparkles and magical swirls in red, yellow, and green gradient background. A glowing brain icon with a magical aura and a magic wand are visible. The text reads 'ADHD BRAIN MAGIC' in bold white letters. The mug is placed on a clean white surface with soft shadows, shot from a 3/4 angle, high resolution, commercial product photography style
targetAudience: ADHD individuals, neurodivergent creatives, people who embrace their unique brain wiring
